Play

When I'm not designing
I'm building community

A collection of projects outside of my day job founding design orgs, running hackathons, and bringing designers together.

Some examples

Chaos Consulting

UX audits & volunteer design work

Consulting · Pro bono

I take on the occasional UX audit, scrappy redesign, or pro bono project for early-stage teams and nonprofits who need a design eye but not a full hire. If that sounds like you, get in touch.

Email to learn more →

Design Advice

Mentoring, speaking & portfolio reviews

Mentorship · Speaking

Love talking through the messy parts of breaking into design. Open to portfolio reviews, speaking events, and general career chats. Reach out and let's figure it out together.

Reach out →

Design community · Education

Built the first UI/UX community at UC Santa Cruz bringing together students and aspiring designers around design education.
